why: Black has four in a row at row 7, columns 4-5-6-7. The left end (col 3) is blocked by White. Playing (7,8) completes five-in-a-row (cols 4-8) — an immediate win. It is the unique immediate winning move.
rejected_note: (7,3) is occupied by White; no other move wins immediately. Any move other than (7,8) fails to win this turn and is therefore not the global best.
scoring: Exact match to (7,8) = full credit. Identifying the four-in-a-row threat but playing a non-winning move = partial. Coordinate convention must be stated/consistent.
